rows.description: Recepta varia
rows.notes: Consensus from both extractors. Clearly a header with no associated monetary amounts.

rows.description: Novr. 10. 1774. Dr Shortridge's Benefx half a year to Mids:
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Description taken from gemini-flash, which accurately transcribes 'Dr Shortridge's Benefx' and integrates the marginal date 'Novr. 10. 1774.' after visual verification.

rows.description: Novr. 22. Mr Bloomfields Plate Money
rows.notes: Description (including marginal date) taken from gemini-flash. Amounts from claude-haiku, which correctly identified '08' in the shillings column and '0' in the pounds column after visual verification. Gemini-flash incorrectly placed '8' in pounds.

rows.description: Janr. 30. 1775. Exchequer Annuity to Xmas
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Description is a combination of both extractors, integrating the marginal date 'Janr. 30. 1775.'. Clear reading from image.

rows.description: Midsr. & Xmas Div: in Stock, 3 p.Cent: consol:
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Description taken from gemini-flash, which accurately transcribes '3 p.Cent:' after visual verification of the image. Claude-haiku incorrectly read '3d Rat:'.

rows.description: Mart: 20 Increment. of Mr Richards, Bursar
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Description taken from gemini-flash, which accurately transcribes 'Bursar' and the marginal date 'Mart: 20' after visual verification. Claude-haiku incorrectly read 'Barrator'.

rows.description: Apr: 3 Took out of the Chest for L. Wittenham Div:
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Description taken from gemini-flash, which accurately transcribes 'Chest' and the marginal date 'Apr: 3' after visual verification. Claude-haiku incorrectly read 'Plate'.

rows.description: Jun: 5. Two Sconces for Sac: Disp:
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Description taken from gemini-flash, which accurately transcribes 'Sconces for Sac: Disp:' and the marginal date 'Jun: 5.' after visual verification. Claude-haiku's description was inaccurate.

rows.description: Dr Shortridge's Benefs half a year to Xmas-
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Description taken from gemini-flash, which accurately transcribes 'Dr Shortridge's Benefs' after visual verification. Claude-haiku incorrectly read 'Sr Partridge's Benefit'.

rows.description: June Mr. Oswald Jackson's Acct. for the Rector estate for the Year from Midsr 1773 to Midsr 1774
rows.notes: Both agree this is a header with no amounts. Description taken from gemini-flash, which accurately transcribes 'Acct. for the Rector estate' and the marginal date 'June' after visual verification. Claude-haiku incorrectly read 'dett for the Vicarage state'.

rows.description: Money Rent
rows.notes: Description in consensus. Amounts taken from gemini-flash after visual verification, as '265' is clearly written in the pounds column. Claude-haiku incorrectly read '263'.

rows.description: Corn Rent
rows.notes: Description in consensus. Amounts taken from gemini-flash after visual verification, as '007' (7) is clearly written in the pounds column. Claude-haiku incorrectly read '9'.

rows.description: Subtotal of Money Rent and Corn Rent
rows.notes: Consensus on values and row type. Verified arithmetic sum from corrected preceding entries (265-0-0 + 7-2-0 = 272-2-0). Description was inferred from context.

rows.description: Allowed Land Tax
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Description taken from gemini-flash, which accurately transcribes 'Allowed Land Tax' after visual verification. Claude-haiku incorrectly read 'Allotmd'.

rows.description: Rent for 3 Closes
rows.notes: Description in consensus. Pounds amount (16) and pence fraction (0.5) taken from gemini-flash after visual verification; the symbol after '10' is clearly a half-penny. Claude-haiku incorrectly read '10' for pounds and '0.25' for the fraction.

rows.description: Deduct
rows.notes: Description taken from gemini-flash (Deduct). Amounts are clear in the image. The fraction symbol after '1' is clearly a half-penny (0.5), as noted by gemini-flash. Verified arithmetic sum of preceding deduction entries (24-17-3 + 16-7-10.5 = 41-5-1.5).

rows.description: July 22? Recd Balance
rows.notes: Description based on visual verification ('July 22? - Recd Balance'). Amounts are clear in the primary columns. The fraction symbol after '10' is clearly a half-penny (0.5), as noted by gemini-flash. Verified arithmetic sum (272-2-0 minus 41-5-1.5 = 230-16-10.5).

rows.description: July 26. Increment from Mr Newbery, Bursar
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Description taken from gemini-flash, which accurately transcribes 'Bursar' and the marginal date 'July 26.' after visual verification. The 3/4 fraction symbol is clear.

rows.description: Aug. 17. Took out of the College Chest
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Description taken from gemini-flash, which accurately transcribes 'Chest' and the marginal date 'Aug. 17.' after visual verification. Claude-haiku incorrectly read 'Glebe'.

rows.description: Jul. 22. House Fees from Mr Sarrande, Dean
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Description taken from gemini-flash, which accurately transcribes 'Sarrande' and the marginal date 'Jul. 22.' after visual verification. Claude-haiku incorrectly read 'Terrance'.

rows.description: Grand Total
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts and fraction (827-3-8.25), which are clearly written. The fraction symbol after '8' is a clear 1/4 (farthing). This is a grand total indicated by the double underline. Note that the written value does not arithmetically sum from visible preceding entries if taken as a simple cumulative total, similar to gemini-flash's observation. However, the task is to extract what is written.

rows.description: Recepta pro hoc anno 9 (et pro debitis anni praecedentis)
rows.notes: Description merged from both extractors to include '9' and 'et pro debitis', based on visual verification. The text is clearly linked by a curly brace to the amount (1575-6-0), making it a single conceptual entry of type 'header' with an associated total, as correctly identified by gemini-flash. Claude-haiku incorrectly split this into two separate rows and initially omitted the amount from its header.
